agents_routes.description: New deep-linkable routes under React Router. Sidebar ga/gc shortcuts navigate to /agents and /chats respectively (shortcut reconciled from the prior gh=/chats binding that collided with gh=/graph in the CONTEXT authoritative keymap). Wave 2 of wireframe-rollout creates placeholder /agents and /chats routes; this set replaces those placeholders with real content.

sidebar_nav_extension.signature: NAV_GROUPS['Execution'].items += [{ id: 'agents', label: 'Agents', path: '/agents', shortcut: 'ga' }, { id: 'chats', label: 'Chats', path: '/chats', shortcut: 'gc' }]
sidebar_nav_extension.description: Extends the Execution nav group introduced in wireframe-rollout Wave 2 (types/layout.ts NAV_GROUPS with workspace/execution/library sections). Previous contract bound gh=/chats; this rewrite reconciles to CONTEXT authoritative map gc=/chats (matching wireframe-rollout Wave 2's types/layout.ts grouping and avoiding the gh=/graph collision). Wave 2 already inserts stub nav entries; this set adjusts icons and wires real behavior.

agents_page.signature: <AgentsPage /> composing PageHeader (title 'Agents', action slot with SearchInput + 'Launch New Run' button), StatCard grid ('Running' / 'Waiting' / 'Failed' / 'Completed'), DataTable for runs (status StatusBadge, skill mono, duration mono, set ref mono, cost mono), EmptyState when no runs
agents_page.description: Primary list view for all agent runs across the project. Composes wireframe-rollout Wave 1 primitives: PageHeader at the top, StatCard grid for per-status counts, DataTable for the runs list with mono tokens for technical fields, EmptyState for first-time onboarding. 'Launch New Run' button opens the SkillLauncher modal from skill-invocation-ui. Consolidated polling via /api/dashboard. Cites .planning/branding/wireframe.html section 01 (lines 640-785).

agent_run_page.signature: <AgentRunPage /> composing PageHeader (title: run ID, description: skill name, action slot: pause/stop), StatusBadge pill (RUNNING 00:04:32 / WAITING / FAILED / COMPLETED -- color+label per WCAG 1.4.1), live activity feed as stacked ToolCallCard instances, telemetry SurfaceCard + DataTable for cost/token/duration; NO composer; keyboard shortcuts Shift+P=pause, Shift+S=stop
agent_run_page.description: Run-detail page for autonomous skills. Composes wireframe-rollout Wave 1 primitives: PageHeader at the top, StatusBadge for status indication (color + text per WCAG 1.4.1), stacked ToolCallCard components for the live activity feed (spinner/checkmark/duration/expandable args+result), SurfaceCard wrapping a DataTable for telemetry. Closing the tab does not kill the run. Reopening re-attaches via SSE + polling fallback. Cites .planning/branding/chatbot-wireframe.html tool-call section and BRANDING.md section chat-surface, Tool-call cards subsection.

chats_page.signature: <ChatsPage /> composing PageHeader (title 'Chats', action slot: 'New Chat' button opening SkillGallery filtered to interactive skills), DataTable for threads (title, skill mono, timestamp mono, status StatusBadge), EmptyState when no threads
chats_page.description: Thread list view for all chat sessions. Composes wireframe-rollout Wave 1 primitives: PageHeader at the top, DataTable for the threads list with mono tokens for timestamp/skill, StatusBadge for per-thread status, EmptyState for first-time onboarding. 'New Chat' opens the SkillGallery component from skill-invocation-ui filtered to interactive skills. Cites .planning/branding/wireframe.html section 01.

chat_thread_page.signature: <ChatThreadPage /> with persistent bottom Composer, scrollable message list, inline ToolCallCard components, inline StructuredQuestion for can_use_tool prompts, ErrorCard for errors, AutoScrollPill for auto-scroll opt-out, StreamingCursor during token streams, SlashAutocomplete above composer when user types /
chat_thread_page.description: Chat detail page for interactive skills. Composes wireframe-rollout Wave 1 chat-surface primitives: Composer persistent at the bottom, scrollable message list rendered with react-markdown, inline ToolCallCard components per tool use (spinner/checkmark/duration/expandable args+result), inline StructuredQuestion forms for can_use_tool / AskUserQuestion prompts, ErrorCard for run errors, AutoScrollPill when the user scrolls up, StreamingCursor while tokens stream, SlashAutocomplete above the composer triggered on '/'. Unlike AgentRunPage, has a composer for back-and-forth. Cites the entire .planning/branding/chatbot-wireframe.html and BRANDING.md section chat-surface (all subsections: Message bubbles, Structured-question form, Tool-call cards, Error card, Composer, Autoscroll pill, Streaming cursor, Slash autocomplete).

use_agent_events_hook.signature: function useAgentEvents(runId: string): {events, status, reconnect} -- SSE primary with 2-5s polling fallback, ?since=N replay on reconnect
use_agent_events_hook.description: React hook for streaming agent events. Abstracts SSE + polling fallback. Reconnects on network hiccup with gap-replay.

use_chats_hook.signature: function useChats() -> {threads, createThread, sendMessage}; function useChatThread(id) -> {thread, messages, stream}
use_chats_hook.description: React hooks for chat state management.

chat_schema.signature: class Chat(SQLModel, table=True): id, project_id, skill_name, created_at, last_message_at, title; class ChatMessage(SQLModel, table=True): id, chat_id (FK), role (user|assistant|tool), content, tool_calls (json), agent_run_id (FK | None), seq, created_at; class ChatAttachment(SQLModel, table=True, nullable fields): id, chat_id, message_id, kind, payload -- stubbed for v7.1
chat_schema.description: Chat persistence schema. ChatAttachment stubbed with all-nullable fields per OVERSIGHTS guidance (avoid breaking migration in v7.1).

chat_service.signature: app/services/chat_service.py: async def create_thread(project_id, skill_name) -> Chat; async def send_message(chat_id, content) -> ChatMessage; async def stream_response(chat_id) -> AsyncIterator[ChatMessage]
chat_service.description: Service layer bridging chat UI and agent runtime. A chat thread binds to a long-lived AgentSession with composer-based input.

consolidated_dashboard_endpoint.description: Single endpoint that replaces 4-5 independent polls to prevent React Query thundering herd on tab focus. Jittered 5s TanStack Query interval. Note: Wave 2 of wireframe-rollout wires dashboard stat cards to stub values with a TODO to consume this endpoint once this set ships; this set fulfills those TODOs.

vite_sse_proxy_config.signature: frontend/vite.config.ts proxy rule with correct headers for event-stream (no buffering, content-type preservation)
vite_sse_proxy_config.description: Vite dev-server SSE proxy configuration. Without it, SSE buffers in dev and never flushes.

accessibility_hooks.description: A11y surface narrowed in the redesign. The primitive-scoped hooks usePrefersReducedMotion and useAutoScrollWithOptOut are absorbed into wireframe-rollout's web/frontend/src/components/primitives/hooks/ (co-located with the primitives that need them, per Wave 1 of wireframe-rollout). This set's remaining a11y surface is: LiveRegion aria-live component for streaming content and aria-busy announcements during token streams, and useFocusTrap hook for approval modals (reused from web-tool-bridge). Keyboard-accessible pause/stop/approve controls, WCAG AA color contrast, and prefers-reduced-motion respect all flow through the wireframe-rollout primitive hooks. Cites BRANDING.md section anti-patterns and section chat-surface.
accessibility_hooks._redesign_rename: was accessibility_primitives; renamed to accessibility_hooks because the redesign absorbs primitive-scoped a11y hooks (usePrefersReducedMotion, useAutoScrollWithOptOut) into components/primitives/hooks/ in wireframe-rollout Wave 1

empty_state_onboarding.signature: <AgentsEmptyState /> and <ChatsEmptyState /> compose the EmptyState primitive with 3-action lists
empty_state_onboarding.description: First-time onboarding components composing wireframe-rollout Wave 1's EmptyState primitive with 3 example actions each. Agents empty state: 'Try /rapid:status, /rapid:plan-set, /rapid:execute-set'. Chats empty state: 'Try /rapid:discuss-set, /rapid:quick, /rapid:bug-fix'. Explains chat-vs-run distinction. Cites CONTEXT Cross-Page Shared Patterns section.

runs_http_and_sse.description: AgentsPage and AgentRunPage consume these endpoints

sse_event_schema.signature: typed event kinds (assistant_text, thinking, tool_use, tool_result, ask_user, permission_req, status, run_complete) with stable payloads
sse_event_schema.description: useAgentEvents hook consumes this schema to render inline tool-call cards, streaming text, status pill updates

agent_run_model.description: ChatMessage.agent_run_id is an FK to agent_runs.id

ask_user_modal_components.description: Chat thread page and run detail page both mount these modals when can_use_tool/ask_user events arrive

skill_launcher_components.description: AgentsPage 'Launch New Run' button opens SkillLauncher; ChatsPage 'New Chat' uses same gallery filtered to interactive skills

wireframe_primitives.description: All page/component exports above compose primitives from wireframe-rollout Wave 1: PageHeader, EmptyState, StatCard, DataTable, StatusBadge, StatusDot, HealthDot, SurfaceCard, ToolCallCard, StructuredQuestion, ErrorCard, Composer, SlashAutocomplete, AutoScrollPill, StreamingCursor, Kbd, SearchInput.

run_survives_tab_close.description: Closing the browser tab does not interrupt the run. Reopening the same /agents/:runId route re-attaches via SSE (with ?since=N replay) + SQLite backfill. Matches user's CLAUDE.md polling preference and Replit Agent 3 / Devin / Manus conventions.

polling_primary_sse_augmentation.description: Run list and run status poll at 2-5s jittered interval. SSE is used for streaming text and tool-call events only (not as the primary status signal). Consolidated dashboard endpoint to prevent thundering herd.

status_pill_color_and_label.description: Every status pill uses both color and text label per WCAG 1.4.1 (RUNNING green+text, WAITING yellow+text, FAILED red+text, COMPLETED blue+text). Never color alone.

keyboard_accessibility.description: All interactive controls are keyboard-reachable. Shift+P pauses, Shift+S stops (run detail). Modal focus-trap + ESC reject (approval modal). Tab order is logical. Screen-reader announcements via ARIA live regions.

no_composer_on_run_detail.description: AgentRunPage has no composer -- it is NOT a chat. Autonomous runs do not accept user input mid-run (only pause/stop). This is load-bearing UX: users know from chrome alone whether they're in chat or autonomous mode.

prefers_reduced_motion_respected.description: Streaming cursor, status-pill pulse, and activity-feed autoscroll animations are suppressed when prefers-reduced-motion is set.

auto_scroll_opt_out.description: Activity feed and chat message list auto-scroll to bottom by default, but scrolling up manually disables auto-scroll until the user scrolls back to bottom. Prevents losing place during long streams.

empty_state_onboarding_present.description: Agents and Chats tabs both render onboarding empty state when no runs/threads exist. Onboarding explains chat-vs-run distinction with 3 example actions.

adopts_wireframe_primitives.description: All chat-surface and list-surface components in this set compose primitives from wireframe-rollout (components/primitives/). This set does NOT ship new primitives; new composition or new primitive needs must be raised as wireframe-rollout follow-up, not added here.

sidebar_shortcut_map_matches_context.description: Sidebar nav shortcuts for Agents and Chats are ga and gc respectively, matching wireframe-rollout CONTEXT authoritative map. The previous contract encoded gh=/chats which collided with gh=/graph; this rewrite reconciles.
